Malaysia Airlines in recent schedule update filed its 4th route to be operated by the new Airbus A330-900neo aircraft, set to scheduled on Kuala Lumpur – Tokyo Narita route on 01 MAR 2025. The A330neo aircraft will operate on MH088/089 service.

Malaysia Airlines this week revised planned operational aircraft on Kuala Lumpur – Tokyo Narita route. From 17 SEP 2025 to 25 OCT 2025, MH070/071 service during this period will be operated by Airbus A330-300 (except selected dates in October), instead of A350-900.

Malaysia Airlines in Northern summer 2025 season plans to resume service to France, as the oneWorld member resumes Kuala Lumpur – Paris Charles de Gaulle route on 22 MAR 2025. Airbus A350-900XWB aircraft to operate this route 4 times a week, increasing to 1 daily from 29 MAR 2025.

Malaysia Airlines in the fourth quarter of 2025 schedules frequency reductions on Kuala Lumpur – Paris Charles de Gaulle route, where the airline schedules 6 weekly flights, instead of 7, during the period of 06 OCT 2025 – 30 NOV 2025 (Malaysia departure).

title: London
extra_notes: Malaysia Airlines in November 2025 schedules selected service reductions on Kuala Lumpur – London Heathrow route, as MH004/001 to be cancelled on selected dates: 05, 11, 18, 24. With the recent adjustments, the airline schedules 13 weekly flights for the month of November.
